item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are currently looking for Engine Cadets for immediate embarkation.

Candidates who are available to join at short notice and meet the required standards are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Cadet Position on Ropax Ferry in the Baltic Sea at Polaris Maritime Services Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

CONSHIPPING is expanding its team and is recruiting Deck Cadets for a RO-RO Cargo vessel. If you are looking to start a career in the maritime industry and gain experience onboard a modern commercial vessel, this is the right opportunity for you!

Vessel Type: RO-RO Cargo

Contract Duration: 4 months ± 1 month ON/OFF

Net Salary: 520 EURO

Embarkation Date: February



Apply to this job

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position: CADET

Vessel: General Cargo, Flag: Antigua, Built: 1993, GT 2419, LOA 5m.

Trading area: Europe, Baltic, Russian ports

Join date: 19 NOVEMBER – St. Petersburg

For our sailors, we connect a salary program with Raiffeisen (the exchange rate in the bank application increases by + 3 – 4 rubles).



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cadet – General Cargo Vessel – Antigua Flag – STCW Required at Prusmarine Ltd.
[Gold Job] Need Deck Cadet/Sport Attendant on Sailing Passenger Vessel at

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

At NORTADA, we are committed to bringing motivated and capable cadets on board. We believe that real experience at sea is the foundation of a strong maritime career — and we are ready to provide that opportunity.

Our cadet program is structured to give future officers early exposure to onboard operations, vessel routines, and teamwork in a professional environment. We welcome candidates who are focused, disciplined, and eager to learn.

What We Offer:

• Cadet placements for both Deck and Engine departments

• Integration into the daily work of the vessel under supervision

• Clear structure of tasks and expectations onboard

• Support from experienced crew members

• Opportunity to grow within the company based on performance and conduct

Who Can Apply

We accept applications from cadets currently enrolled in recognized maritime academies and holding valid documentation. Candidates must be ready for work onboard and committed to continuous learning and growth.

To apply, please send your CV and a short cover letter to:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Cadet Program - Charting Your Future at NORTADA SHIPMANAGEMENT LDA

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

Danica Crewing Services is a leading provider of highly competent officers from Eastern Europe. With headquarters in Hamburg and with our owned and fully controlled network of manning agencies in Ukraine and Russia. In 2008, the first office was established in Odessa. Today, we have offices in Odessa in Ukraine, in Saint Petersburg, Vladivostok and Nakhodka in Russia. Presently, more than 1400 seafarers are connected to first-rate shipowners and are deployed to all types of vessels through our offices.Our business concept is clear: to connect demanding shipowners and managers with highly competent seafarers through trustworthy crewing services exceeding the highest industry standards and acting as a fair link to the seafarers.

We are looking for:

  • Position: Deck Cadet
  • Vessel Type: Ro-Ro Vessel
  • Contract duration: 6 months
  • Requirment: Good English.

Please send your CV to:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Deck Cadet for Ro-Ro Vessel at Danica Crewing Services

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

UAMAX Shipmanagement  is a crewing agency which is the main connecting link in the chain “shipowner-seafarer”. Our company is a licenced Crew Provider with great experience in the sphere we are working.

We are looking for:

  • Position: Electro Cadet
  • Ship Type: Bulker
  • Salary: 800 USD

Please send your CV to:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Electro Cadet for Bulker Vessel with salary 800 USD at UAMAX
